Bash("c:\\Users\\thoma\\Documents\\GitHub\\layout-as-schematic\\scratch\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import sys, warnings
warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
from ihp import PDK
PDK.activate\(\)

# Try kfactory''s global layout
import kfactory as kf
kcl = kf.kcl
print\(f''kf.kcl type: {type\(kcl\)}'', file=sys.stderr\)

# Get GDS info from kfactory layer index
from ihp.tech import LAYER
for name in [''Activdrawing'', ''GatPolydrawing'', ''Metal1drawing'', ''Metal2drawing'', ''TopMetal1drawing'']:
    m = LAYER[name]
    idx = m.value
    try:
        li = kcl.layout.get_info\(idx\)
        print\(f''{name}: idx={idx} -> GDS\({li.layer}, {li.datatype}\)'', file=sys.stderr\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''{name}: idx={idx} -> FAILED: {e}'', file=sys.stderr\)
")

Bash("c:\\Users\\thoma\\Documents\\GitHub\\layout-as-schematic\\scratch\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import sys, warnings
warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
from ihp import cells, PDK
from gdsfactory.get_factories import get_cells
import gdsfactory as gf

PDK.activate\(\)
factories = get_cells\(cells\)

# Check what port.layer looks like for a common cell
for cell_name in [''nmos'', ''pmos'', ''mim'']:
    if cell_name not in factories:
        continue
    try:
        c = gf.get_component\(factories[cell_name]\)
        for port in list\(c.ports\)[:2]:
            raw = port.layer
            print\(f''{cell_name}/{port.name}: port.layer={raw!r} type={type\(raw\).__name__}'', file=sys.stderr\)
            if hasattr\(raw, ''__iter__''\):
                print\(f''  -> list={list\(raw\)}'', file=sys.stderr\)
        break
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''{cell_name}: {e}'', file=sys.stderr\)
")
